core_mechanism: confidence-bound (optimism-under-uncertainty) multi-armed bandit that sequentially selects among discrete actions to balance exploration and exploitation, achieving logarithmic regret matching the Lai-Robbins lower bound
brief_reason: The abstract formulates choosing the cost-minimizing interval as a stochastic multi-armed bandit and proposes Hoeffding- and Bernstein-based lower-confidence-bound algorithms achieving O(K log T) regret matching the Lai-Robbins bound.
